title: clavenna tetrandra
intro: Clavenna tetrandra, also known as Chinese Thunder of Heaven or Thunder of Heaven, is a type of traditional Chinese medicinal plant that belongs to the family of Rutaceae, commonly referred to as the citrus family. The plant's roots and rhizomes are used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clavenna tetrandra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Clavenna tetrandra can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
